description_long: This object is a handheld gaming console with a rectangular body and detachable controllers on either side, reminiscent of popular portable gaming devices. The front features a large color display screen showing a retro-style video game, flanked by an orange controller on the left and a green controller on the right. The left controller has a set of black buttons and a joystick, while the right controller features a joystick and a large circular button. The back of the device is mostly gray with the word 'Bindendo' printed in red, and the colored ends match the controllers. The device appears to be made primarily of plastic with some electronic components inside, and the screen is likely glass or acrylic. The overall design is compact, lightweight, and intended for portable use in urban environments.
description: A compact, handheld gaming console with a large screen, orange and green detachable controllers, and the brand 'Bindendo' on the back.
description_view_0: Front view showing the display screen with a video game, orange left controller with buttons, and green right controller with joystick.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the slim profile and protruding joysticks on both controllers.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the gray back panel with 'Bindendo' branding and colored controller ends.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slim edge and the orange controller's joystick.
